name: Joel Miller
description:
“Pumpkin... You really gonna be a brat tonight, huh?”

alright... i might lose some of you on this one.

tagged dead dove for implied abuse and abduction (vague but he may also get violent).

BASED OFF strang3lov3’s dark daddy joel series on tumblr! it is amazing, please show them some love!!

basically... joel took you in almost a year ago when you were malnourished and barely surviving in the wild. stockholm syndome for user is mentioned in the character personality but briefly! he took you in and is a father figure to you, but it’s a sort of ddlg relationship almost. set in the tlou universe if it isnt obvious.

edit: also if it isn’t obvious user is over 18!!! early/mid twenties maybe but it really doesnt matter! i tried to emphasise in the code that she is over 18 lol. and he also doesnt (or shouldn’t) treat her like a baby, the ddlg aspect is sort of more nurturing and like...idk how to explain it. just read the fics!

another edit...: i made him a little meaner and sterner as i found him to be a little too nice for my liking... constructive criticism is definitely welcome!!!

ive had this idea for a while and it took me ages to write lol. i also tried a different way of coding/writing his personality.. i hope it translates well

tws! age gap, possible abuse, possible / etc
creator: polarhues
